Testimonials

5-Star Rated In University City
From Real Local Customers

See Our Reviews on Google→

Amara K.

18 October 2025

I am a grad student at Wash U and locked myself out of my apartment near the Loop around 11 PM. Called Nonstop Lock & Key expecting a long wait, but the technician was at my door in about 15 minutes. He even gave me a student discount. Super professional and understanding of the late hour.

R

Robert C.

9 January 2026

Repaired the original mortise locks on our Parkview Gardens home. Like new.

Maya J.

12 October 2024

Honda key snapped at the Delmar Loop. New one programmed in the parking spot. Affordable.

F

Felix B.

14 March 2026

I locked myself out of my place while running to the corner store. Tech arrived right away and had the door open with no damage to the historic hardware. Super respectful with the older building. Honest pricing too.

Olamide T.

19 December 2025

I run a coffee shop on the Loop and needed an emergency rekey after our part-time barista quit unexpectedly. Nonstop came out the same morning, replaced the back deadbolt and rekeyed the front. Done before opening. Lifesaver for a small business.

Priya N.

26 February 2026

Just moved into a charming bungalow and wanted the locks rekeyed. Alex got to all four exterior doors in under an hour and gave us advice on a smart lock for the side entry. No pressure to upgrade. Honest, neighborly service.

J

Jeremy A.

24 January 2026

My key broke off in the deadbolt of my apartment along the Olive Boulevard corridor at 1am. Nonstop got there in under 25 minutes, extracted the key piece, and tested the lock to confirm it still worked. Total professionals. Will save this number.

Our Services

Locksmith Services In University City

24/7 emergency response for lockouts, lock rekeys, key fob programming, and more, serving University City homes, cars, and businesses.

Automotive

Car Lockout Service

Locked out of your car? Our mobile locksmiths arrive fast to safely unlock your vehicle without damage.

View Service in University City

Residential

House Lockout Service

Locked out of your home? We use non-destructive methods to get you back inside fast, day or night.

View Service in University City

Residential

Lock Rekey Service

Change who has access to your home without replacing your locks. Rekeying is fast, affordable, and effective.

View Service in University City

Automotive

Car Key Replacement

Lost or broken car keys? We cut and program replacement keys on-site for all makes and models.

View Service in University City

Automotive

Key Fob Programming

Need a new key fob or remote programmed? We program and replace key fobs on-site for most vehicles.

View Service in University City

Residential

Lock Installation & Replacement

New lock installation and old lock replacement for homes and businesses. Deadbolts, knobs, levers, and more.

View Service in University City

We also handle front door lock installation, smart lock setup, lock changes, keyless entry systems, key duplication, transponder key programming, car key cutting, and more in University City. Our mobile team handles it 24/7.

View All ServicesOr Call (314) 532-1112

About Us

Your Family-Owned Locksmith In University City

University City is one of the most eclectic communities in the St. Louis area, and Nonstop Lock & Key has the versatility to match. Our technicians are just as comfortable restoring a century-old mortise lock in Parkview Gardens as they are programming a transponder key in a campus parking lot. We understand the around-the-clock rhythm of a city shaped by students, artists, and longtime residents alike, which is why we offer genuine 24/7 availability with no after-hours surcharges on standard lockout calls. Fast, affordable, and always respectful of your property, we are the locksmith U City trusts.

From car lockouts and key replacement to lock rekeying and smart lock installation, our licensed technicians serve every University City home and business with upfront pricing and no hidden fees.

Call (314) 532-1112Get a Free Quote

Family-Owned Since 2010

Licensed, insured, and trusted by University City residents and businesses.

Local Knowledge

Locksmith Services Tailored To University City

University City pulses with creative energy, cultural diversity, and academic ambition. The Delmar Loop is a nationally recognized entertainment district, Washington University anchors the southern end of the city, and neighborhoods like Parkview Gardens and Ames Place showcase beautiful early-twentieth-century architecture. A significant student and renter population creates high demand for lockout services, while the mix of historic homes and modern apartments means locksmiths here must be skilled with everything from antique rim locks to electronic access systems.

Common Locksmith Needs in University City

Our Promise

Honest Service Every Time. Transparent Pricing, No Hidden Fees.

Service Areas

Serving Every Neighborhood In University City

Nonstop Lock & Key provides full locksmith coverage across University City, MO, including the Delmar Loop, Parkview Gardens, University Heights, Ames Place, and the Olive Boulevard corridor. We also serve adjacent communities such as Clayton, Richmond Heights, Olivette, Overland, and Pagedale, giving us broad reach throughout the inner-ring suburbs of St. Louis.

Delmar Loop
University Heights
Parkview Gardens
Ames Place
Olive Boulevard Corridor

We come to you anywhere in University City. Average arrival: 15-25 minutes.

Call (314) 532-1112

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions In University City

We offer a student discount on residential lockout services when you present a valid university ID. Many students near Washington University and along the Delmar Loop take advantage of this, especially during the hectic start and end of each semester.
